name: code-toolkit
description: Process-discipline + canon-grounded coding toolkit for Codex CLI — Superpowers-style workflow + 8-source primary-grounding from `domain-teams:code-team`. Phase 1 only ships Claude Code; this Codex manifest is a v0.2.5 ship target placeholder (see ROADMAP.md Phase 2.5).

interface.shortDescription: Process-discipline + canon-grounded coding workflow for Codex CLI
interface.longDescription: Use code-toolkit to drive agent work through brainstorming, plan-writing, subagent-driven development, TDD iron-law, systematic debugging, code review, and branch finishing. Each rule grounded in primary sources (Clean Code / Beck 2002 / Fowler 2018 / OWASP ASVS / 徳丸本 Ch.6). Coexists with `domain-teams:code-team` (passive gate) and `dev-workflow:{git-memory, complexity-critique}`.
defaultPrompt: Let's add a feature to this project.
I want to refactor this module.
